reasoning: Mamata's schemes—Khadya Sathi, Kanyashree for my daughter, Swasthya Sathi for my wife—these are real. I see them. Our panchayat, rough as the TMC leaders are, gets things done through these channels. Shantanu Thakur is Union Minister now, maybe good for Matuas, but I am Bagdi—what has the centre given me directly? My real fear is the NRC, the documents, the costs and trouble for poor families like mine. TMC says no NRC; BJP wants it. I can't risk that. Biswajit Das defected once already—why trust him now?
primary_drivers: Proven delivery of welfare schemes (Khadya Sathi, Kanyashree, Swasthya Sathi)
NRC anxiety as a poor, document-vulnerable person
Direct panchayat access and local trust in TMC system
